# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-RLS-004](task-0049): Audit/Check-in Summary Generation

## Purpose

Generate audit/check-in summary.

## Scope

- Audit data collection
- Summary generation
- Check-in tracking

## Implementation

1. Collect audit data
2. Generate summary
3. Track check-ins

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Audit data collected
2. Summary generated
3. Check-ins tracked
